rationale: The cited paper is used directly as a source for measurement: the authors repeatedly state that their brand loyalty items are adapted or modified from Yim, Tse, and Chan (2008) (e.g., in Studies 1b and 1c). Because brand loyalty is the focal dependent variable, this is a meaningful methodological role rather than a passing background mention. At the same time, the citation is not used to build the new UA-based theory, so its function is primarily instrument application.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Yim et al. (2008) as a measurement foundation by adapting its brand loyalty scale items to operationalize loyalty across multiple empirical studies. This is a methodological reuse of the cited work rather than a theoretical extension of its affection framework.
